description: A shipment of raw materials was received with visible damage and needs to be returned to the supplier.

nodes.task_description: Create a 'Quality Notification' documenting the damage with photos.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a quality report and attaches photographic evidence.

nodes.task_description: Request a Return Material Authorization (RMA) number from the supplier.

expected_outcome.value: Agent contacts the supplier and obtains an RMA number for the return.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for the damaged goods to be shipped back to the supplier using the RMA number.

expected_outcome.value: Agent schedules a pickup for the return shipment.
